[[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] '''Anki Pace''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Xenoarchaeology/Legends|xenoarchaeologist]] who taught at the [[University of Agamar]].

==Biography==
Born to parents on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]], Anki Pace attended the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]] and was studying for her doctorate in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. During her studies, members of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] were present during a time that would later be known as the [[Phantom Project|Phantom Affair]]. A close friend of [[Koyi Komad]], Pace attained her doctorate while Komad joined the Rogues and married one of its members, [[Nrin Vakil]]; [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] Pace was present at the [[Wedding of Nrin Vakil and Koyi Komad|wedding]].<ref name="DTI" />

Years later, Dr. Pace had gotten a job as a [[Professor/Legends|professor]] at the [[University of Agamar]], working in the [[Archaeology/Legends|xenoarchaeology]] department. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Dr. Pace was sent to [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]] with a team including students [[Jens (student)|Jens]], [[Vil (student)|Vil]], [[Trista Orlanis]], and [[Denna]]. There, the team uncovered ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi artifact/Legends|artifacts]], suspecting Jedi involvement in the thefts of the artifacts that left their guardians with amnesia. While on Bimmiel, they also [[AR-312|discovered]] something else—the mummified corpse of [[Mongei Shai]], a [[Warrior caste|warrior]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].<ref name="The New Jedi Order Sourcebook">''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''</ref>
